title: More Cartography Tables
description: Cartography Tables for every kind of wood
body:
![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/projects/minecraft/mods/more-cartography-tables/title.png?) --- [![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/lieon-studios-creation.svg)](https://modrinth.com/organization/lieonstudios) [![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/badges/label/requires/quad.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) Community: [![discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/discord.svg)](https://discord.lieonlion.dev/) Source: [![github](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/github.svg)](https://github.com/pnk2u/More-Cartography-Tables) pnku: [![pnku.de](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/shared/pres/icon/pnku_de_logo.svg)](https://www.pnku.de) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/modrinth.svg)](https://modrinth.com/user/pnku) [![curseforge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LieOnLion/LieOnLion/main/images/badges/buttons/curseforge.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/pnku/) ![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/dividers/horizontal/pnku_top.svg) ## More Cartography Tables Fill your builds with colourful map-making now that each wood type has its own cartography table. ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pnk2u/resources/main/ModProjects/More-Cartography-Tables/pres/mr_desc_banner.png) A Cartographer from a desert village in front of his collection of all 12 Cartography Table variants with each having fitting [More Torch Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-torch-variants) hanging over it. ### Adding 11 new _Cartography Tables_ to Minecraft.
How can I craft vanilla Cartography Tables using modded wood types from Biomes o' Plenty, [Let's Do] mods, and others? Unfortunately, the vanilla Cartography Table crafting recipe has to be overridden for the crafting of the variants to function.

But usually these mods add their wood types to the Vanilla recipe, which creates a conflict. Fortunately, there is also a fairly easy way around this issue.

That is what the "More Compatibility Variants" are for:
These datapacks/mods resolve this issue across all of our "More X Variants" mods, so you can craft cartography tables and other vanilla items/blocks just as you would expect.
 
Currently available **_More Compatibility Variants_**:
 - [Biomes o' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-bop)
 - [[Let's Do] Meadow, (Nether)Vinery, Beachparty and Blooming Nature](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-lets-do)
 - [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-ns)
 - [Oh The Biomes We've Gone](https://modrinth.com/datapack/more-compatibility-variants-otbwg)
Would you like to see support for another mod with custom wood types? Let me know via [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/sA42pp6cuX), [GitHub](https://github.com/pnk2u), or [E-Mail](mailto:pnku@pnku.de)!
--- ## Compatible with [Quad](https://modrinth.com/mod/quad) 1.3.0+'s block replacement: ![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/szt4z.webp) Peeking out from a Cartographer's house onto a Farm of a Desert Village: We can see that instead of a _Dark Oak Cartography Table_, an _Oak Torch_ and a regular _Composter_, the game now generates the village with a _**Jungle Cartography Table**_, a _**Jungle Torch**_ (from [More Torch Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-torch-variants)) and a _**Jungle Composter**_ (from [More Composter Variants](https://modrinth.com/mod/more-composter-variants)). ![](https://assets.lieonstudios.dev/common/dividers/horizontal/pnku_bottom.svg) [**![](https://uwu.catgirl.host/i/nn4a0.gif)**]()
